channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Mali Defence Minister killed, fresh fighting between army and rebels
item.description: Defence Minister Sadio Camara died in a car bomb attack on his home in Kita. His second wife and two grandchildren also died. Defence Minister Sadio Camara, his second wife and two of his grandchildren died after a car bomb attack on his home in the junta stronghold of Kita, outside Bamako, his family and an official said.

item.title: Alex Marquez wins Spanish Grand Prix while brother Marc crashes out
item.description: Alex Marquez won the Spanish Grand Prix. His brother Marc crashed out. Alex Marquez wins Spanish Grand Prix while brother Marc crashes out.

item.title: Trump's 'Lincoln' Reply To 'Why Does This Keep Happening To You?' Question
item.description: Trump faced a safety threat on Saturday. It is not his first safety threat. Saturday's incident is far from the first time Trump has faced a threat to his safety.

item.title: Russian Defence Minister In North Korea, To Hold Talks With Top Leadership
item.description: Russian Defence Minister visited North Korea. He will hold talks with top leadership. This is the second senior Russian official to visit Pyongyang in recent days. Russian Defence Minister In North Korea, To Hold Talks With Top Leadership.

item.title: Trump assassination attempts and security incidents
item.description: A timeline lists Trump assassination attempts and security incidents during his presidency and campaign. Timeline reveals assassination attempts on Trump, including incidents during his presidency and campaign rallies.

item.title: Inside Washington Hilton attack, how President Trump was escorted out
item.description: A man is in custody after trying to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Donald Trump was attending the event at the Washington Hilton. Inside Washington Hilton attack, how President Trump was escorted out.

item.title: "Saw Trump's Resilient Side": Indian Journalist Who Attended US Event To NDTV
item.description: Saurabh Shukla spoke to NDTV about attending a US event with Donald Trump. He discussed Trump's resilient side. Newsmobile editor-in-chief Saurabh Shukla in conversation with NDTV's Shiv Aroor. "Saw Trump's Resilient Side": Indian Journalist Who Attended US Event To NDTV.

item.title: Erica Kirk In Tears After White House Dinner Shooting
item.description: Erica Kirk was in tears after a shooting at the Washington Hilton. The event was taking place at the time of the incident. The shooting happened at the time when the event was taking place at the Washington Hilton.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Hormuz will not return to previous state', Iran
item.description: Donald Trump said a shooting incident will not deter him from winning in Iran. He made the statement amid ceasefire talks. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Shooting incident won't deter me from win in Iran war, says Trump The Times of India.

item.title: Karoline Leavitt's Unwitting Prophecy Came True As 'Shots Fired' At Trump Event
item.description: Karoline Leavitt previously mentioned shots being fired. A shooting occurred at a Trump event at the Washington Hilton. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt (file). Karoline Leavitt's Unwitting Prophecy Came True As 'Shots Fired' At Trump Event.

item.title: What we know about the suspected ‘assassination attempt’ on Donald Trump
item.description: A man armed with a gun tried to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Donald Trump was in attendance at the Washington Hilton. A man armed is in custody after trying to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner, which Trump was attending.

item.title: Kenya's Sawe becomes first man to run marathon under two hours at London Marathon
item.description: The London Marathon saw a historic moment as Kenyan runner Eliud Kipchoge's training partner, Kelvin Kiptum, finished in 1 hour 59 minutes 31 seconds, becoming the first man to break the two-hour barrier in a marathon.

item.title: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks
item.description: Jared Kushner and Elliott Broidy's associate, Steven Witkoff, are no longer traveling to Pakistan for Iran talks, according to US President Donald Trump. Live Updates: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks CBS News.

item.title: UK Influencer Dies 6 Days After Getting Hit By Car Outside London Nightclub
item.description: Polish social media influencer Klaudia Zakrzewska, known as Klaudiaglam, died six days after being hit by a car outside a London nightclub, leaving behind a following of over 250,000 on Instagram.

item.title: UK In Touch With US Ahead Of King Charles' Visit Amid Trump Security Breach
item.description: The UK government is in contact with the US ahead of King Charles' visit, amid concerns over security following a breach at the White House, where the monarch and his wife, Camilla, are due to arrive on Monday.

item.title: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi expected back in Pakistan despite U.S. cancellation
item.description: Oman's Sultan met Iran's Araghchi to discuss the regional situation. The meeting occurred amid US-Iran tensions. U. S. President Trump cancels Pakistan talks trip and says Iran war on hold; U.

item.title: 40 Years After the Meltdown, War Layers Another Disaster on Chernobyl
item.description: The Chernobyl disaster zone remains under army control 40 years after the meltdown, with plans to develop the contaminated area for economic benefits in Ukraine stalled for the foreseeable future.

item.title: Ethiopia's Assefa breaks own world record at London Marathon
item.description: Ethiopia's Assefa broke his own world record at the London Marathon. Ethiopia's Assefa breaks own world record at London Marathon.

item.title: Explosive device kills 13, injures 38 on bus in southwestern Colombia as violence persists
item.description: A device killed 13 and injured 38 on a bus in Colombia's Cauca region. Octavio Guzman, the Governor of the region of Cauca, said on X that the device was set off while the bus was travelling along the Panamerican Highway in the municipality of Cajibio.

item.title: At least four people killed in Israeli attacks in Gaza despite ‘ceasefire’
item.description: Israeli forces killed at least four people in Gaza despite a ceasefire. Israeli forces keep advancing further into western Gaza, slowly expanding the area of their control in the east.
